titles.home: Holiday rentals on Rodrigues Island, Mauritius

descriptions.default: ZouriteBnb, the Rodrigues holiday rental platform: book directly with local hosts.
descriptions.home: Holiday rentals in Rodrigues: Creole houses, villas and homestay rooms. Book your stay directly with local Rodriguan hosts.
descriptions.accommodations: Browse all available accommodations in Rodrigues: Creole houses, villas, bungalows and homestay rooms, bookable directly with hosts.
descriptions.accommodation: Photos, amenities, availability and location: everything you need to plan your stay in this Rodrigues accommodation.
descriptions.solidarityProjects: Discover the solidarity projects supported by ZouriteBnb and Rodrigues hosts: every booking contributes to local development.
descriptions.solidarityProject: About this solidarity project: goals, progress and how ZouriteBnb bookings contribute.
descriptions.termsOfUse: Terms of use of the ZouriteBnb holiday rental platform.
descriptions.termsOfSale: Terms of sale for bookings made on ZouriteBnb.
descriptions.legalNotice: Legal notice of ZouriteBnb, holiday rental platform in Rodrigues.
descriptions.privacyPolicy: Privacy policy and personal data protection on ZouriteBnb.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

request.title: Request a reservation
request.subtitle: The host will be notified and has 24h to accept or decline.
request.notePlaceholder: Introduce yourself, mention if you're traveling with children, a pet, etc.
request.hostHas24h: No payment is required at this stage. You'll be notified as soon as the host replies.

confirm.missingDates: Missing dates. Go back to the listing to pick your stay dates.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.subtitle: Card details are required to confirm, but nothing will be charged until the host accepts your request.

success.title: Your booking request has been received
success.subtitle: Your payment has been pre-authorized. Nothing will be charged until the host accepts your request.
success.hostDelay: The host has 24 hours to accept your request. You'll be notified as soon as they respond.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: All reservations of your team, newest first.

empty.title: No reservations
empty.description: Your guests' bookings will show up here as soon as the first request comes in.

conversations.title: Messages
conversations.subtitle: Exchanges with guests
conversations.placeholderSubtitle: Choose a conversation from the list to view the messages and reply.

panel.title: Reservation details
panel.pendingNotice: You have 24h to accept or decline this request.

conversation.inboxSubtitle: Find here the exchange with each host for your reservation requests.
conversation.empty: You have no conversations yet. Make your first reservation request from a listing.
conversation.readOnly: Read-only mode — log in to reply.

cancel.refundPreview: {{amount}} ({{percent}}%) would be refunded if you cancel now.
cancel.modalSubtitle: Based on the cancellation policy and today's date, here is what you would be refunded.
cancel.hostNotice: As the host, the guest will be fully refunded. A message explaining the reason is required.
cancel.messagePlaceholder: Add a note for the host or guest — it will be posted in the conversation.

modification.modalSubtitle: Propose new dates. The price will be recalculated and the host must approve the change.
modification.hint: The reservation stays unchanged until the host approves the change.

wishlist.title: My wishlist
wishlist.empty: You haven't saved any accommodation yet. Tap the heart on a listing to find it here.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your gîte and reservations.
auth.bookingLoginSubtitle: Sign in to complete your booking.
auth.bookingRegisterSubtitle: Create your account to confirm your booking.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new one.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for this address, an email with a reset link has just been sent. Remember to check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
resetPassword.error: Reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.missingToken: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.

verifyEmail.successText: Thank you! Your email address has been verified.
verifyEmail.errorText: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Sign in to request a new one.

emailVerification.bannerText: Confirm your email address to secure your account.

bookingContext.title: One last step before your booking
bookingContext.login: Sign in to confirm your booking request and proceed to secure payment.
bookingContext.register: To confirm your booking and proceed to payment, create your account — it's free and quick.
bookingContext.reassurance: Nothing will be charged until the host accepts your request.

solidarity.intro: In Rodrigues, every booked stay supports a local solidarity project.
solidarity.fallbackText: Every booking contributes to a project that supports the island and its people.

team.title: Settings
team.loginRequired: Sign in to manage your team.
team.subtitle: Pick the solidarity project to feature on your accommodations
team.favoriteProjectHelp: This project is displayed on each of your accommodation pages and pre-selected in the booking form.
team.photoHelp: JPEG, PNG or WebP, 10 MB max.
team.bioHelp: A few words about yourself, shown publicly to travelers.
team.coHostsHelp: Invite co-hosts by email to share accommodation management.

bankAccount.title: Bank account
bankAccount.help: IBAN where you'll receive payouts from your reservations. Leave the IBAN empty to remove the account.
bankAccount.holderRequired: The account holder name is required when you provide an IBAN.

revenue.title: Revenue & payouts
revenue.subtitle: Track your earnings and payout status, computed from your confirmed reservations.

payouts.title: Payout statement
payouts.subtitle: A payout becomes available once the stay is over.

backoffice.title: Manage accommodations
backoffice.subtitle: Full list including drafts
backoffice.sidebarFooter: Your gîte, your world. Take care of every guest.
backoffice.travelerSidebarFooter: Your messages and personal info, all in one quiet place.

empty.title: No accommodation yet
empty.description: Create your first listing to start receiving bookings.
empty.filteredDescription: Try another filter to find your listings.

hostHome.subtitle: Here's what's happening at your place today and in the coming days.

current.title: Staying with us today
current.subtitle: Guests currently in your accommodations.
current.empty: No guests are staying with you today.

arriving.title: Upcoming arrivals
arriving.subtitle: Confirmed reservations within the next 14 days.
arriving.empty: No arrivals scheduled in the next two weeks.

leaving.title: Farewell
leaving.subtitle: Guests checking out today — don't forget to thank them.

hero.title: Holiday rentals on Rodrigues island
hero.subtitle: Discover unique places to stay for your next trip

listing.title: Accommodations
listing.subtitle: Refine your search to find the perfect place
listing.searchAsIMove: Search as I move the map

advanced.priceHelp: Leave empty to skip this filter.

homepage.featuredSubtitle: Discover our top-rated properties selected by travellers

activities.title: Popular activities
activities.divingDesc: Explore the coral reefs and the exceptional marine life of the lagoon.
activities.hikingDesc: Walk the picturesque trails and discover breathtaking panoramas.
activities.excursionsDesc: Visit the preserved islets and historical sites of the island.
activities.gastronomyDesc: Savour authentic Creole cuisine and fresh seafood.

discover.title: Discover Rodrigues Island
discover.description: Located in the Indian Ocean, Rodrigues is a preserved gem offering an authentic experience far from mass tourism. With its pristine beaches, crystal-clear lagoons and unique culture, it is the ideal destination for an unforgettable holiday.

projects.title: Our Solidarity Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover the local initiatives we support to preserve the environment and unique culture of Rodrigues.
projects.empty: No solidarity project for the moment.
projects.pageSubtitle: All the initiatives we support in Rodrigues.

cta.title: Want to support this project?
cta.subtitle: Every contribution makes a real difference for Rodrigues.

related.title: Explore more initiatives
related.subtitle: Other projects we support in Rodrigues.

edit.title: Edit accommodation
edit.descriptionReadonly: Title and description cannot be edited at this time.

detail.instantConfirmNote: Instant confirmation — no need to wait for host approval
detail.ownAccommodationNotice: You can't book an accommodation owned by your team.

footer.description: Vacation rental platform in Rodrigues, where every stay supports a local solidarity project.

wizard.createSubtitle: Create your listing in a few steps

descriptionStep.intro: Start by making travellers want to visit with an eye-catching title and description of your property.
descriptionStep.titlePlaceholder: E.g.: Sea-view villa, Downtown design loft...
descriptionStep.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your accommodation: type, number of bedrooms, amenities, atmosphere, neighbourhood highlights, nearby facilities (restaurants, transport, shops), access (walking, car needed, parking)...
descriptionStep.descriptionHint: Describe your accommodation in detail: type, amenities, access, nearby facilities. A good description attracts more travellers.
descriptionStep.priceHint: This is the default price. You can change it later and set seasonal rates.
descriptionStep.weeklyPromotionHint: Discount percentage automatically applied to stays of at least 7 nights. Leave empty to disable.
descriptionStep.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 3 characters
descriptionStep.descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 10 characters

cancellationStep.intro: Choose the terms that apply when a guest cancels their booking.

flexible.title: Flexible
flexible.description: Full refund if the guest cancels at least 24 hours before check-in.

moderate.title: Moderate
moderate.description: Full refund up to 5 days before check-in, then 50% afterwards.

dynamicPricing.title: Dynamic pricing
dynamicPricing.weekendHint: Percentage added to Friday and Saturday nights. Leave empty to disable.
dynamicPricing.lastMinuteHint: Discount applied when booking fewer than the given number of days before check-in. Fill both fields or neither.
dynamicPricing.noPeriods: No seasonal pricing. The nightly price applies everywhere.

instantBooking.title: Instant booking
instantBooking.description: Guest requests are confirmed automatically, without your approval. Payment is captured immediately.

stayConstraints.title: Stay length
stayConstraints.description: Limit the number of nights per booking. Leave empty for no limit.

houseRules.title: House rules
houseRules.description: Tell guests what is allowed in your accommodation and any additional rules.
houseRules.notesHint: Shown on the accommodation page (1000 characters max).
houseRules.notesPlaceholder: E.g. Please remove your shoes indoors.

capacityStep.intro: Specify the capacity of your accommodation to help travellers find the ideal place.

amenitiesStep.intro: Select the amenities available in your accommodation.

addressStep.intro: Provide the address of your property so travellers can find it.
addressStep.mapHint: Click on the map to position your accommodation. Coordinates will update automatically.
addressStep.privacyText: Exact GPS coordinates are not shared with travellers who don't have a confirmed booking. On the public map, your accommodation will be shown within an approximate radius to protect your privacy.

photosStep.intro: Add photos to showcase your accommodation. Each photo is uploaded individually.
photosStep.dropHint: or click to browse — JPEG, PNG, WebP (max. 20)

successStep.title: Your listing is ready!
successStep.subtitle: Your accommodation has been created successfully. You can publish it from your dashboard.

empty.title: No accommodation
empty.description: Add an accommodation to view and plan its reservations in the calendar.

photos.dropzone: Drag your photos here or click to browse
photos.formats: JPEG, PNG or WebP — 20 photos max

review.charsRemaining_one: {{count}} more character before you can post
review.charsRemaining_other: {{count}} more characters before you can post

hostReply.title: Host's reply
hostReply.placeholder: Thank the guest or add a clarification…

error.validation: Check your rating (1 to 5) and your comment (50 characters minimum).
error.forbidden: You are not allowed to leave this review.
error.unauthenticated: You must be logged in to leave a review.
error.generic: Something went wrong while submitting your review.

verification.title: Identity verification
verification.subtitle: Confirm your identity to build trust with hosts and travelers.
verification.documentHint: Click to upload a photo of your document (JPEG, PNG or WebP).
verification.selfieHint: Click to upload a recent selfie (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

travelerHome.subtitle: Find your upcoming trips here.
travelerHome.emptyText: Once you book a place, your trips will show up here.
